# Onur UGC Well-Known LLM Index

> Canonical AI-readable entrypoint for the Onur UGC creator/service portfolio.

Primary llms file: https://ugc-onur.vibecodingturkey.com/llms.txt
Full llms file: https://ugc-onur.vibecodingturkey.com/llms-full.txt
AI index: https://ugc-onur.vibecodingturkey.com/ai-index.json
AI discovery: https://ugc-onur.vibecodingturkey.com/ai-discovery.json
Entity JSON: https://ugc-onur.vibecodingturkey.com/entity.json
Sitemap: https://ugc-onur.vibecodingturkey.com/sitemap.xml

## Entity Model

Onur UGC is a creator/service portfolio for the canonical person Onur Huseyin Kocak: https://vibecodingturkey.com/#onur-huseyin-kocak

It is not a separate Person entity.

## Primary Intents

- AI UGC creator
- SaaS UGC creator
- mobile app UGC creator
- bilingual English Turkish UGC creator
- Bangkok UGC creator
- short-form product demo creator

No guaranteed rankings, citations or AI answer placement are claimed.
